query: SELECT id, title, type, IF(videoUrl IS NULL, 'IS_NULL', CONCAT('URL:', LEFT(videoUrl, 80))) as video_status, IF(videoKey IS NULL, 'IS_NULL', CONCAT('KEY:', LEFT(videoKey, 80))) as key_status FROM lessons ORDER BY id DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 47pCq5NGHGJeBvC.92834fb5c54d --database KeFY3JWWo4FiRjgKgB47TN --execute SELECT id, title, type, IF(videoUrl IS NULL, 'IS_NULL', CONCAT('URL:', LEFT(videoUrl, 80))) as video_status, IF(videoKey IS NULL, 'IS_NULL', CONCAT('KEY:', LEFT(videoKey, 80))) as key_status FROM lessons ORDER BY id DESC;
